Soviet invasion of Afghanistan

# Soviet invasion of Afghanistan

### A backdrop

[](https://substack.com/@sadashree)

![Ratnakar Sadasyula's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!R73I!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F81a2c542-8b3f-4ade-98d2-a40950cffbe3_2640x1980.jpeg)

[Ratnakar Sadasyula](https://substack.com/@sadashree)

Aug 16, 2021

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

1

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Share

With Afghanistan being in the spotlight once again as the Taliban capture the country, a look here at where it all started. While the conflict there is too complex, with a number of factors comming into the play, one could say it was the Soviet invasion in 1979 that triggered the chain of events in a way.But fact is even before the invasion, the country had undergone a series of coups and counter coups, mostly backed by Soviet Union.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!V7Lq!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F6f620f86-d22a-4fbc-9c79-100e4397c906_285x360.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!V7Lq!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F6f620f86-d22a-4fbc-9c79-100e4397c906_285x360.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!mQcc!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F03017449-b1a5-4bd1-ab11-7708234676b4_133x186.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!mQcc!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F03017449-b1a5-4bd1-ab11-7708234676b4_133x186.jpeg)

Mohammed Zahir Shah, the last king of Afghanistan, who had a 39 year reign over the country, was deposed in 1973, by his own cousin Mohd Daoud Khan,while he was on vacation in Italy. The coup backed by the Soviet Union,ended close to 250 years of monarchy, as Daoud established a single party republic. Zahir’s rule marked the modernization of the country, as well as close diplomatic relations with most countries in the world. He remained in exile in Rome till 2002, and would return after the fall of the Taliban. He passed away later in 2007.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!Sd7e!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9c9b0eac-cf2d-42a8-92e6-252ce58a7c39_220x266.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!Sd7e!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9c9b0eac-cf2d-42a8-92e6-252ce58a7c39_220x266.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Daud became the 1st President of Afghanistan, known for his authoritarian rule, and his educational, social reforms. Though close to the Soviet Union, he fell out with them over what he believed were attempts to dictate the country’s foreign policy. The trigger though was the rift in the People's Democratic Party of Afghanistan(PDPA), between the Parcham faction that favored socialism and the Khalq faction that was hardcore Marxist.

When a prominent member of PDPA, belonging to Parcham faction was murdered, Daud was held responsible by ,Nur Mohammad Taraki, the founder of the party, who in turn was backed by the Kabul intelligentsia. Protests broke out against the Govt, as most of the PDPA leaders including Babrak Kamal, Hafizullah Amin were put under house arrest.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!k_Py!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fcb319ac4-1099-4d1d-9360-cf846693c990_360x348.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!k_Py!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fcb319ac4-1099-4d1d-9360-cf846693c990_360x348.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!u7ea!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2b5b5ea9-9448-4870-a229-d3af86270d4a_360x239.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!u7ea!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2b5b5ea9-9448-4870-a229-d3af86270d4a_360x239.jpeg)

It was Amin who would order the Saur revolution in 1978, so named after the second month of the Iranian Hijri calendar, instigating the army officers, with active backing of the Soviet Union. Amin called the coup, an extension of the Russian Revolution, and this would in a way begin the long period of conflict in the country. It was one bloody revolt, that saw close to 43 killed, and the official end of the Barakzai dynasty that had ruled Afghanistan for close to 150 years. Daud and his entire family were killed in the revolt, while his cabinet members and supporters were done away in a bloody purge.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!_p_H!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F19ecad1d-9a8e-4eb0-ac50-90e49075f9c2_456x680.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!_p_H!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F19ecad1d-9a8e-4eb0-ac50-90e49075f9c2_456x680.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Nur Muhammed Taraki was installed as President of the Democratic Republic of Afghanistan, which was initially welcome by most ordinary people, who were dissatisfied with the Daud Government. However Taraki’s Stalinist style tactics of eliminating his Parchamite rivals through purges, locking up dissidents, wiping out entire villages whom he accused of being counter revolutionaries,turned people against him. On top of it a personality cult where he proclaimed himself to be the Great Leader.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!QLmS!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F88edf948-2538-4a30-b438-d9e7baf415d3_313x424.png)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!QLmS!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F88edf948-2538-4a30-b438-d9e7baf415d3_313x424.png)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!Nly8!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F7d2d570b-c955-4d3d-a9aa-c7c5c97ea599_200x298.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!Nly8!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F7d2d570b-c955-4d3d-a9aa-c7c5c97ea599_200x298.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Soon he fell out with Amin, his once upon a time close friend, also the Soviets did not think too highly of him. Taking advantage of the situation Amin weaned away those close to Taraki, in cahoots with the Soviet Embassy there. When an abortive assasination attempt was made on Amin in September, 1979, he in turn ordered Taraki to be killed and secretly burried on October 8,1979. And also got the Afghan media to mention it as a natural death.

However Leonid Brezhnev, then President of Soviet Union, was furious at not being consulted, and this was one of the factors that led to the Soviet intervention in 1979. Amin turned out to be even worse than Taraki, with mass executions of counter revolutionaries, disappearances of people. The Army too turned against him, while his rivals who were in exile in the Soviet Union began to plot against him.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!uuqR!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F0c7e6fe5-450e-4ef5-b2fe-20963f8dbd8c_360x247.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!uuqR!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F0c7e6fe5-450e-4ef5-b2fe-20963f8dbd8c_360x247.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!NyHj!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F3198c2fc-7ff3-4169-b2f9-9d4e1e87cbfb_360x232.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!NyHj!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F3198c2fc-7ff3-4169-b2f9-9d4e1e87cbfb_360x232.jpeg)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!a1SW!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc00f8ace-81a9-46cb-870e-18a07b9d4dba_360x216.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!a1SW!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc00f8ace-81a9-46cb-870e-18a07b9d4dba_360x216.jpeg)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bnTD!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5b1f5404-c993-41dc-9f9b-958f06fbf18d_360x232.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bnTD!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5b1f5404-c993-41dc-9f9b-958f06fbf18d_360x232.jpeg)

And finally the Soviets intervened in December, 1979 under Operation Storm-333 , as two KGB units code named,Зенит (Zenit) and Гром (Grom) meaning Thunder, stormed the heavily fortified Tajbeg Palace. Soviet tanks rolled across the Amu Darya border, along with exiled members of the Parcham faction. Amin was assasinated, while 300 Army guards and 30 Palace guards were killed in the attack. Around 1700 Afghan soldiers surrendered, while Babrak Kamal was installed as the President. This would begin the decade long Soviet-Afghan war.

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)
